message:
fix: propagate blocked status through parent-child deps in triage (#1)

Robot triage marked beads as actionable even when their parent epic had
unresolved blockers. The actionable_ids() function only checked direct
blocking dependencies, ignoring parent-child relationships.

Port the transitive parent-child blocking logic from the Go version:
1. Build parent->children index from parent-child dependencies
2. BFS propagate blocked status from parents to children (max depth 50)
3. Exclude transitively blocked children from actionable set

Also add is_parent_child() to Dependency model and three new tests
covering parent blocker propagation, unblocked parents, and mixed-prefix
datasets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
